name: mission-control
description: Local single-machine command center for supervising Claude Code from anywhere

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mission-control/shared && npm run build -w @mission-control/hook && npm run build -w @mission-control/web && npm run build -w @mission-control/daemon
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mission-control/shared && npm run typecheck -w @mission-control/daemon && npm run typecheck -w @mission-control/web
